nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Southwell was born about 1394, in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Southwell V, was 33 and his mother, Agnes Samon, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Isabelle de Bois. He died about 1453, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Southwell est né environ 1394, à Feliskirk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Southwell V, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Samon, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Isabelle de Bois. Il est décédé environ 1453, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Southwell um 1394 in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Southwell V 33 und seine Mutter Agnes Samon 24. Er hatte mit Isabelle de Bois mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1453 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Southwell è nato il circa 1394 nel Feliskirk, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Southwell V, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Samon, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Isabelle de Bois. Morì circa 1453, nel Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Southwellが約1394年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフエリスキルクで生まれた時，父John de Southwell Vは33歳，母Agnes Samonは24歳であった。彼はIsabelle de Boisとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1453年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Southwell(이)가 대략 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 펠리스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Southwell V(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Samon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Bois(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1453년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 고스힐에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.
